base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of palette_reference_by_zone — a ui from 1985 super mario bros. Palette chart — all 6 zone-submappings (Overworld, Underground, Castle, Underwater, Mushrooms, Snow) each showing hex codes for Nestopia/Nesen and FCEUX emulators. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Palette chart — all 6 zone-submappings (Overworld, Underground, Castle, Underwater, Mushrooms, Snow) each showing hex codes for Nestopia/Nesen and FCEUX emulators; documentation for tile-palette-applicability at runtime
